actionConfiguration.body:
WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO cos_package (session_id, package_no, cos_type, lead_time_days, created_by)
  SELECT {{this.params.newSessionId}}::INT, package_no, cos_type, lead_time_days, created_by
  FROM cos_package WHERE session_id = {{this.params.oldSessionId}}::INT
  RETURNING id, package_no
)
SELECT ins.id AS new_package_id, old.id AS old_package_id
FROM inserted ins
JOIN cos_package old ON old.package_no = ins.package_no AND old.session_id = {{this.params.oldSessionId}}::INT;
